steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content: Add $98x$ to both sides of $-49x=-98x$ to get $$49x=0.$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: Dividing by $49$ gives the unique solution $x=0$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Adding $98x$ to each side of the given equation yields $49x=0$. Dividing each side of this equation by $49$ yields $x=0$. This means that $0$ is the only solution to the given equation. Therefore, the given equation has exactly one solution.
